# Valesų gerovė

Valesų gerovė is a Lithuanian naturopathic shop with a focus on natural health and wellness. The brand centers around holistic well-being, offering a curated selection of natural remedies and dietary supplements. The name evokes a sense of harmony and care, rooted in Lithuanian culture and a nature-inspired philosophy.

Source: https://zappytestsite.com

---

## Fuel Your Body Naturally with Protein &amp; More — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://zappytestsite.com
Description: Discover curated natural remedies, protein shakes for muscle gain, and holistic wellness essentials. Your trusted vitamin shop for a healthier, balanced life starts here.

Lithuanian Naturopathic Shop

# Nature's Wisdom,Your Wellbeing


### Valesų gerovė is Lithuania's vibrant naturopathic destination — where powerful natural remedies, premium dietary supplements, and centuries of botanical wisdom come together to help you thrive, energise, and feel truly alive!


Get Personalised Guidance

## Rooted in Nature. Chosen with Care.


At Valesų gerovė, every remedy and supplement we carry is selected with intention — guided by naturopathic principles, honest sourcing, and a deep respect for the body's natural balance.










Natural Remedies

### Curated Remedies, Crafted by Nature


Our collection of natural medicine draws on time-honoured botanical traditions. Each remedy is carefully reviewed for purity and provenance — so you can trust what you bring into your home and your body.









Supplements

### Supplements Chosen for Quality & Clarity


From magnesium glycinate for restful sleep to targeted nutritional support, every supplement in our range meets rigorous standards. No filler, no confusion — just transparent formulations you can rely on.









Holistic Wellness

### A Holistic Approach Grounded in Balance


Wellness is more than a product — it is a practice. We offer guidance rooted in education and everyday balance, helping you build sustainable habits that support your whole self, naturally.


















Naturopathic Approach


## Understanding Wellness Through Nature


A naturopathic approach to daily well-being begins with understanding that the body thrives when supported by ingredients drawn from nature — thoughtfully sourced, carefully selected, and consistently used. At Valesų gerovė, we believe that natural medicine works best when it becomes part of a considered daily routine rather than a reactive measure.


Choosing the right supplement or remedy means looking beyond the label. Ingredient quality, sourcing transparency, and alignment with your personal wellness goals all shape the outcome. Whether you are exploring magnesium glycinate for sleep, adaptogens for resilience, or botanical blends for everyday balance, guidance and consistency are what transform good intentions into lasting results.









### Ingredient Awareness


Know what you put in your body — every plant, mineral, and extract has a purpose and a provenance.









### Daily Routine


Consistency over intensity — small, intentional habits compound into meaningful well-being over time.









### Sourcing Quality


Responsible sourcing and clean formulations are the foundation of any remedy that genuinely supports health.









### Expert Guidance


Navigating natural medicine is easier with informed guidance tailored to your individual wellness needs.





Learn Our Philosophy

























Trusted by our community

## What our customers say


From natural medicine to daily supplements, our customers share how a more thoughtful approach to wellness has made a lasting difference in their lives.










I had tried so many things before finding Valesų gerovė. The team took time to explain each remedy carefully — no rushed advice, just genuine guidance. For the first time, I felt confident about what I was putting into my body. My magnesium glycinate sleep routine has genuinely changed how I rest.




### Rūta M.

Vilnius, Lithuania









What sets this shop apart is the calm, unhurried atmosphere. I came in uncertain about natural medicine and left with a clear plan and real understanding. The supplements I chose have become a quiet cornerstone of my daily wellness practice — something I didn't expect to say.




### Tomas K.

Kaunas, Lithuania









I appreciate that Valesų gerovė never overwhelms you with options. Every recommendation felt considered and honest. I've been using their herbal remedies and vitamin shop selections for over a year now, and the quality is consistently excellent. It's become my most trusted source for natural wellness.




### Agnė L.

Klaipėda, Lithuania















Personal Guidance

Whether you have questions about natural medicine, are looking for the right remedy, or simply want thoughtful guidance on your wellness journey — we are here to listen and help. Every person's needs are unique, and we take the time to understand yours.

## Sleep Deeper, Live Stronger with Nature&#39;s Best — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://zappytestsite.com/wellness-approach
Description: Explore our holistic wellness philosophy powered by magnesium glycinate for sleep, adaptogens, and time-tested natural medicine that nurtures your body from the inside out.

Sleep Deeper, Live Stronger with Nature's Best — Valesų gerovė

Our Naturopathic Philosophy

# Wellness Rooted in Nature, Guided by Knowledge


At Valesų gerovė, we believe that true well-being begins with understanding what you put into your body — and why. Our approach draws from centuries of Baltic herbal tradition, refined through modern naturopathic research.


We curate every remedy and supplement in our collection with care, transparency, and a deep respect for the body's natural intelligence. Whether you are exploring natural medicine for the first time or seeking a more informed path to vitality, our role is to guide — never to overwhelm. From calming botanicals to targeted dietary support, each product reflects a balanced, evidence-aware philosophy that honours both tradition and science.



A thoughtful selection of natural remedies and supplements, chosen to support your body's own capacity for balance and renewal.

Explore Our Approach







Natural & Considered














Our Wellness Approach


## Four Paths to Natural Well-Being


At Valesų gerovė, we believe lasting health is built through daily intention. Each focus area reflects a carefully curated path — drawing on the wisdom of natural medicine and the clarity of modern naturopathy.












Daily Vitality

### Sustain Your Energy, Naturally


True vitality begins with what you give your body each morning. Our curated remedies and dietary supplements — from adaptogenic roots to whole-food vitamins — support sustained energy, mental clarity, and resilience throughout the day.










Digestive Comfort

### Gentle Support for Inner Balance


A calm digestive system is the foundation of whole-body wellness. We guide you toward gentle, plant-based solutions — digestive bitters, probiotic blends, and soothing botanicals — that restore comfort and promote healthy gut balance without harsh interventions.










Seasonal Resilience

### Prepare Your Body for Every Season


As the Baltic seasons shift, so do the demands on your immune system. Our seasonal approach combines time-honoured natural remedies — elderberry, vitamin D, and zinc formulations — to help your body adapt and stay strong through every change.










Calm Balance

### Rest, Restore, and Find Your Calm


In a world of constant noise, calm is a practice. We offer thoughtfully selected remedies — including magnesium glycinate for sleep, adaptogenic herbs, and nervine botanicals — to ease tension, support restful nights, and nurture emotional equilibrium.
















Our Approach


## How We Support Your Wellness Journey


At Valesų gerovė, we believe lasting well-being begins with listening. Our four-step approach guides you from first conversation to consistent daily practice — rooted in natural medicine and personalised care.





All Products













- 01 ### Listen to Your Needs We begin by truly hearing you — your lifestyle, your concerns, your goals. Every person's path to natural health is unique, and understanding your story is the foundation of everything we do.

- 02 ### Identify the Right Direction Drawing on naturopathic knowledge and a deep understanding of the body's natural rhythms, we help you identify the most suitable holistic direction — whether that involves targeted supplements, herbal remedies, or lifestyle adjustments.

- 03 ### Recommend Supportive Options We curate a personalised selection from our range of natural remedies and dietary supplements — including options like magnesium glycinate for sleep and restorative blends — chosen with care and clinical clarity to complement your wellbeing.

- 04 ### Encourage Daily Practice True wellness emerges through consistency. We support you in building gentle, sustainable daily rituals — so that the benefits of natural medicine become a living, breathing part of your everyday life.







Each recommendation is grounded in nature — selected with purpose, prepared with care.










Common Questions


## Understanding Natural Remedies & Supplements


Honest answers to help you choose wisely, combine thoughtfully, and know when to seek professional guidance.










### How do I choose the right natural remedy for my needs?


Start by identifying your primary concern — whether it's sleep quality, digestive comfort, energy, or immunity. Look for remedies with a clear tradition of use and, where possible, clinical evidence behind the key ingredient. At Valesų gerovė, every product in our selection is chosen for transparency of sourcing and documented purpose, so you can make an informed decision rather than a speculative one.







### Can I combine multiple supplements at the same time?


Many supplements work well together — for example, magnesium glycinate for sleep pairs naturally with calming botanicals like lemon balm or passionflower. However, some combinations can compete for absorption or amplify effects unexpectedly. As a general rule, introduce one new supplement at a time, observe your response over two to four weeks, and consult a healthcare professional if you take any prescription medications.







### What does "natural" actually mean on a product label?


"Natural" is not a regulated term in most markets, so it requires scrutiny. Look for specific certifications — organic, non-GMO, or third-party tested — and read the full ingredient list. At Valesų gerovė, we prioritise products free from unnecessary fillers, artificial binders, and synthetic colourants, and we favour suppliers who publish their sourcing and testing documentation openly.







### How long before I notice results from a new supplement?


This depends greatly on the supplement and the individual. Adaptogenic herbs like ashwagandha or rhodiola typically require four to eight weeks of consistent use before noticeable effects emerge. Minerals such as magnesium glycinate may support sleep quality within days. Fat-soluble vitamins like D3 build up over weeks. Patience and consistency are the most reliable predictors of a positive outcome.










### How do I assess the quality of a supplement brand?


Quality indicators include third-party testing (look for certificates of analysis), GMP-certified manufacturing facilities, clear disclosure of ingredient origins, and standardised extract ratios where applicable. Avoid brands that make exaggerated health claims without substantiation. A trustworthy brand in the natural medicine space will be transparent about what their product contains — and what it does not.







### Are natural remedies safe during pregnancy or breastfeeding?


Not all natural products are safe during pregnancy or lactation. Some herbs — including certain adaptogens and high-dose botanicals — are contraindicated during these periods. Always consult your midwife, obstetrician, or GP before starting any supplement while pregnant or breastfeeding. This is a non-negotiable step, regardless of how gentle or plant-based a product appears.







### When should I seek professional medical advice instead?


Natural remedies and dietary supplements are supportive tools — they are not substitutes for medical diagnosis or treatment. Seek professional advice if you experience persistent or worsening symptoms, if you are managing a chronic condition, or if you are unsure whether a supplement interacts with your current medications. Valesų gerovė encourages a collaborative approach: natural support alongside, not instead of, qualified medical care.







### Do you carry supplements for specific goals like muscle recovery?


Yes — our range includes targeted nutritional support for active individuals, including plant-based protein options and recovery-focused formulas. Whether you are exploring protein shakes for muscle gain or seeking mineral support for post-exercise recovery, our selection focuses on clean formulations with minimal additives. We are happy to guide you toward products aligned with your specific goals and lifestyle.









Have a question not answered here? Get in touch with our team — we are glad to help.








Rooted in nature. Guided by wellness. A Baltic apothecary tradition for modern living.

## Rooted in Nature, Driven by Your Well-Being — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://zappytestsite.com/about
Description: Meet the Lithuanian naturopathic brand redefining wellness. We blend cultural heritage with science-backed natural remedies to help you thrive — because your health deserves authenticity.

Rooted in Nature, Driven by Your Well-Being — Valesų gerovė


































































- Products All Products




- Wellness Approach
- About
- Contact
0


















About Us


# Where Lithuanian Tradition Meets Natural Wellness


Valesų gerovė was born from a deep respect for nature's intelligence and the healing wisdom carried through generations of Baltic life. We are a Lithuanian naturopathic shop dedicated to curating the finest natural remedies and dietary supplements — each chosen with care, each rooted in honesty. Our name means "the wellbeing of the Valesai" — a quiet promise of harmony, wholeness, and gentle restoration.


We believe natural medicine is not a trend but a returning — to slower rhythms, cleaner ingredients, and a more considered way of caring for yourself and those you love.





Rooted in Lithuanian botanical tradition



Carefully sourced, ethically curated remedies



Modern science, ancient plant wisdom















Our Story


## Rooted in Lithuanian Land,Guided by Nature's Wisdom






All Products











Lithuanian forests — our original inspiration



### The Name That Carries a Promise


Valesų gerovė was born from a quiet conviction: that the Lithuanian landscape holds centuries of healing knowledge, waiting to be shared with care. The word gerovė — meaning well-being, flourishing, wholeness — is not merely a label but a commitment. It speaks to the kind of health that is unhurried, deeply rooted, and sustained by nature rather than manufactured in a laboratory.


Our founders grew up surrounded by grandmothers who gathered chamomile at dawn and brewed valerian root before sleep. That intimate, generational relationship with natural medicine is the thread that runs through everything we do — from the remedies we source to the guidance we offer.










### A Living Tradition of Natural Medicine


Lithuania has one of Europe's richest herbal traditions. For generations, Baltic communities have relied on the land's gifts — elderberry for immunity, linden blossom for calm, sea buckthorn for vitality — long before the modern wellness industry gave these practices a name. Valesų gerovė exists to honour and continue that tradition with honesty and rigour.


Every product in our collection is chosen with the same careful attention a village healer once gave to each plant in her garden. We work with trusted producers who share our respect for natural medicine, ensuring that what reaches you is pure, potent, and thoughtfully prepared. We believe that natural remedies and dietary supplements, when chosen wisely, can be a quiet and powerful foundation for daily well-being.




Botanicals chosen for purity and provenance









A space built on calm, trust, and transparency



### A Calm Place to Find Your Path to Wellness


We opened Valesų gerovė because we wanted to create something that felt different from the noise of the modern supplement market — a place where you are never overwhelmed, never pressured, and always guided with genuine care. Whether you are exploring natural remedies for the first time or deepening a practice you have cultivated for years, we are here to help you navigate with clarity.


Our approach is unhurried. We take the time to understand what you are looking for, and we stock only what we genuinely believe in. From our carefully curated range of vitamins and supplements to our collection of traditional herbal preparations, every item on our shelves has earned its place. This is the vitamin shop reimagined as a trusted companion — quiet, knowledgeable, and always on your side.













Our Philosophy


## What We Stand For


Three principles guide every remedy we select, every conversation we have, and every relationship we build with the people who trust us with their health.













### Integrity in Selection


Every remedy and supplement in our collection is chosen with rigorous care. We evaluate each product's origin, formulation, and efficacy — because natural medicine deserves the same scrutiny as any trusted health intervention. We never compromise on purity.














### Respect for the Whole Person


Wellness is not a single dimension. We approach each person as a complete being — body, mind, and daily rhythm. Our curated range of natural remedies and dietary supplements reflects this holistic understanding, supporting long-term well-being rather than isolated symptoms.














### Clarity in Communication


We believe you deserve honest, plain-language guidance about what you are putting into your body. No misleading claims, no overcomplicated jargon. Whether you are exploring natural medicine for the first time or deepening an existing practice, we speak with you — not at you.




















## A Glimpse Into Our World


From hand-selected herbs and glass apothecary vessels to dried botanicals and linen-wrapped remedies — every detail reflects our commitment to natural medicine and holistic well-being.







































Rooted in nature. Guided by wellness. A Baltic apothecary tradition for modern living.

Get in Touch

# We're Here to Guide You


Whether you have questions about our natural remedies, need help understanding our wellness philosophy, or simply want to explore what Valesų gerovė can offer — we welcome your message. Our team is here to listen, advise, and support your journey toward natural medicine and holistic well-being.













## Get in Touch


We're here to guide you on your natural wellness journey. Reach out with any questions about our remedies, supplements, or natural medicine recommendations.








### Write to Us


For product enquiries, ingredient questions, or guidance on natural remedies and dietary supplements, send us an email. We aim to respond within one business day.

[business_email]






### Call or WhatsApp


Prefer to speak directly? Call us during business hours or send a WhatsApp message at any time. We're happy to discuss your wellness needs and help you find the right natural medicine.

[business_phone]






### Visit Our Shop


Come and explore our curated selection of natural remedies and supplements in person. Our team is ready to welcome you and offer personalised wellness guidance rooted in naturopathic tradition.

[business_address]




### Send a Message


Have a specific question about magnesium glycinate for sleep, protein shakes for muscle gain, or any of our natural health products? Fill in the form and we'll get back to you promptly.

Rooted in nature. Guided by care.

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about reaching us and what happens next.





All Products










### How quickly will I receive a response?


We aim to reply to all enquiries within one business day. During busier periods, please allow up to 48 hours. You will always receive a personal response — not an automated reply.





### What kinds of enquiries are welcome?


We warmly welcome questions about our natural remedies, dietary supplements, and holistic wellness products. Whether you are looking for guidance on natural medicine, asking about a specific ingredient, or seeking advice on which supplement may suit your needs, we are happy to help.





### What happens after I submit the contact form?


Once your message is submitted, our team reviews it and routes it to the most relevant person. You will receive a confirmation email shortly after, followed by a personalised reply with any information or recommendations you need.





### Can I request personalised supplement guidance?


Yes — this is one of the things we do best. Share your wellness goals or specific concerns through the contact form and we will suggest suitable natural remedies or supplements from our curated range, tailored to your situation.





### Will my information be kept confidential?


Absolutely. Any personal details you share with us are handled with complete discretion and used solely to respond to your enquiry. We do not share your information with third parties. Please see our Privacy Policy for full details.





### Do you offer support in Lithuanian?


Yes. Our team is fully fluent in Lithuanian and you are welcome to write to us in either Lithuanian or English — whichever feels most natural to you.









Rooted in nature. Guided by wellness. A Baltic apothecary tradition for modern living.

## Return Policy

Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Valesų gerovė







































































- Products All Products




- Wellness Approach
- About
- Contact
0












All Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 4/15/2026



At Valesų gerovė, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

- Products All Products

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  4/15/2026



Valesų gerovė ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









Rooted in nature. Guided by wellness. A Baltic apothecary tradition for modern living.

## Accessibility Statement

- Products All Products

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  April 15, 2026



Valesų gerovė is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Rooted in nature. Guided by wellness. A Baltic apothecary tradition for modern living.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  April 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Valesų gerovė

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - health and wellness / natural remedies provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Valesų gerovė provides health and wellness / natural remedies through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Valesų gerovė. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]

## Product Catalog

### Natural Herbs
URL: https://zappytestsite.com/product/natural-herbs-pjjh2w
Price: 13.00 USD (sale, was 15.00 USD)
Availability: In stock

Natural Herbal Blend for Stress Relief A carefully curated blend of nature's finest herbs, thoughtfully formulated to support your body's natural response to stress and promote a sense of calm and balance. Rooted in the holistic philosophy of Valesų gerovė , this blend embraces the healing power of nature to help you unwind and restore inner harmony. Crafted from premium, naturally sourced herbs Supports relaxation and emotional well-being Gentle, holistic approach to everyday stress management Free from artificial additives

---
